channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18165] racer test_1: crash in lov_conf_set 'BUG: kernel NULL pointer dereference, address: 000000000000001c'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/0a73f736-bf6c-41af-8c24-cc2836d78d91

test_1 failed with the following error on the client (2.15.65.30):

onyx-58vm1 crashed during racer test_1

[13953.970913] LustreError: 211151:0:(lov_object.c:1361:lov_layout_change()) lustre-clilov-ffff9949834fc800: cannot apply new layout on [0x280000bdd:0x987:0x0] : rc = -5
[13953.970933] LustreError: 211151:0:(vvp_io.c:1919:vvp_io_init()) lustre: refresh file layout [0x280000bdd:0x987:0x0] error -5.
[13956.145721] BUG: kernel NULL pointer dereference, address: 000000000000001c
[13956.148238] Oops: 0000 [#1] PREEMPT SMP PTI
[13956.148748] CPU: 1 PID: 218732 Comm: mkdir 5.14.0-427.24.1.el9_4.x86_64 #1
[13956.150034] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
[13956.150730] RIP: 0010:lov_conf_set+0x35a/0x7b0 [lov]
[13956.160489] Call Trace:
[13956.160834]  <TASK>
[13956.167449]  cl_conf_set+0x62/0x140 [obdclass]
[13956.168043]  cl_file_inode_init+0xd5/0x390 [lustre]
[13956.168835]  ll_update_inode+0x44d/0x700 [lustre]
[13956.169466]  ll_iget+0x91/0x360 [lustre]
[13956.170004]  ll_prep_inode+0x3db/0xb80 [lustre]
[13956.171284]  ll_lookup_it_finish.constprop.0+0xd6/0xcb0 [lustre]
[13956.173982]  ll_lookup_it+0x81b/0x1970 [lustre]
[13956.174600]  ll_lookup_nd+0x9a/0x1e0 [lustre]
[13956.175190]  __lookup_slow+0x84/0x130
[13956.175687]  walk_component+0x158/0x1d0
[13956.176617]  path_lookupat+0x6e/0x1c0
[13956.177079]  filename_lookup+0xcf/0x1d0
[13956.179267]  vfs_statx+0x8d/0x170
[13956.179690]  vfs_fstatat+0x54/0x70
[13956.180112]  __do_sys_newfstatat+0x26/0x60
[13956.183407]  do_syscall_64+0x5c/0x90

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/107007 - 5.14.0-427.24.1.el9_4.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/107007 - 5.14.0-427.24.1_lustre.el9.x86_64

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
racer test_1 - onyx-58vm1 crashed during racer test_1
item.summary: racer test_1: crash in lov_conf_set 'BUG: kernel NULL pointer dereference, address: 000000000000001c'

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
